name: market-bubble-chat
description: Market Bubble Chat — Twitch + Kick + X merged into one markets-native overlay, with a local control app and OBS overlay.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix desktop install
scripts.app: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop start
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm --prefix desktop run dist
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
